# ChatterMate

> ChatterMate is an open-source AI customer-support chatbot platform. You can sign up, create AI
> agents, add knowledge sources, and embed a chat widget — all from a browser, the terminal (CLI),
> or programmatically via an AI agent over MCP.

## Start here (AI agents & automation)

Use the **ChatterMate CLI** (the `chattermate` command, installed with `pip install chattermate-cli`)
to sign up and manage everything from the terminal. It is the account/config CLI — distinct from the
self-host Docker tool (`npm install -g chattermate-deploy`).

Minimal end-to-end flow:

```bash
pip install chattermate-cli
chattermate signup --name "Acme Inc" --domain acme.com --admin-email you@acme.com --admin-name "You"
chattermate agent create --name "Support" --type customer_support -i "Be concise" --json
chattermate knowledge add-url --website https://docs.acme.com --agent-id <agent-id>
# Embed on your site:
# <script>window.chattermateId='YOUR_WIDGET_ID';</script>
# <script src="https://app.chattermate.chat/webclient/chattermate.min.js"></script>
```

## Docs

- [AI Agent & Automation Quickstart](https://docs.chattermate.chat/features/agents-quickstart): copy-paste path from signup to a live widget, built for AI agents and CI.
- [CLI reference](https://docs.chattermate.chat/features/cli): the account CLI — signup, login, tokens, agents, workflows, knowledge.
- [MCP Server](https://docs.chattermate.chat/features/mcp-server): let an AI agent configure ChatterMate over the Model Context Protocol (`chattermate-mcp`).
- [Quickstart](https://docs.chattermate.chat/quickstart): hosted vs self-host, side by side.
- [Widget integration](https://docs.chattermate.chat/features/widget): embed the chat widget on any site.
- [Widget Apps & API keys](https://docs.chattermate.chat/features/widget-apps): authenticated widgets and programmatic tokens.

## Key URLs

- Sign up / dashboard: https://app.chattermate.chat
- Hosted API base: https://api.chattermate.chat (routes under `/api/v1`)
- Widget script: https://app.chattermate.chat/webclient/chattermate.min.js
- Documentation: https://docs.chattermate.chat
- GitHub: https://github.com/chattermate/chattermate.chat

## Self-hosting (optional)

- [Self-host with Docker](https://docs.chattermate.chat/quickstart#option-b-self-host-with-docker): run the full stack on your own infrastructure with the self-host CLI (`npm install -g chattermate-deploy`, command `chattermate-deploy init/start/stop`).
- [Docker deployment](https://docs.chattermate.chat/deployment/docker)
